name: datasetProfile
invariants: output.ok === false || output.result.message != null || (Number.isFinite(output.result.rows) && Number.isFinite(output.result.columns) && Array.isArray(output.result.profile))

output.ok === false || !Array.isArray(output.result.profile) || output.result.profile.every(p => typeof p.field === 'string' && ['numeric','categorical','text'].includes(p.type) && Number.isFinite(p.nullRate) && Number.isFinite(p.cardinality))
_note: Pure compute, reads artifact.data. Component sends { dataset }. Returns rows/columns/qualityScore/profile[].{field,type,nullCount,nullRate,cardinality,stats?{min,max,mean,median,q1,q3,outliers}} — the EXACT fields MlActionPanel's EDA card renders (field/type/nullRate/cardinality + stats.mean μ). Empty dataset → honest {message}. A column with a non-finite cell drops below the 80% finite-numeric threshold → classified categorical (no stats), so no NaN stats leak (fixed 2026-06-28).
